p.strong: The operand stack is GLOBAL (shared across all frames)

div.p: The operand stack is NOT per-frame. It's a single global array shared by all function invocations.

ul.li: No need to copy between "callee stack" and "caller stack"
Just pop, pop frame, push back to same array
The "caller's stack" is the same memory as "callee's stack"

div.p: CRITICAL: Value is held in C local variable, NOT on any stack during transition
